_comment: Central config for the Goose Harness web UI. Read by BOTH server.py and server.ps1. The 'backends' URLs drive the health/status panel and the displayed provider host; goose's ACTUAL model provider is configured separately in goose's own config (~/.config/goose/config.yaml on Linux/macOS, %APPDATA%\Block\goose\config\config.yaml on Windows). Any GOOSE_WEB_* environment variable overrides the matching value here. The sidebar tool list is NOT stored here: it is live-discovered from goose's own config.yaml (each enabled extension is handshaked over MCP for its real tools, refreshed ~90s); set GOOSE_CONFIG to point at a non-default config.yaml. Files attached in the chat UI are uploaded (POST /api/upload, raw body) to workspace/<uploads_subdir>/<session>/ -- capped at max_upload_mb per file -- and the agent reads them with its own tools (developer text_editor/shell, computercontroller pdf/docx/xlsx).
